name: Transaction Mapping
description: Maps local BU lines of business to group lines with percentage splits. SLOs: change requests 90 days before year-start, actuarial review within 15 business days, annual updates effective Jan 1.

content.description:
Maps local LoB to group LoB with percentage split.

**SLOs:**
- **Change request deadline:** 90 days before fiscal year start
- **Approval cycle:** Actuarial review within 15 business days
- **Update frequency:** Annual, effective January 1
- **Owner:** Group Chief Actuary

**Mapping Rules by BU:**
- [EuropeRe Mapping Rules](/FutuRe/EuropeRe/TransactionMapping/MappingRules) — 13 split rules across 8 local LoBs
- [AmericasIns Mapping Rules](/FutuRe/AmericasIns/TransactionMapping/MappingRules) — 14 split rules across 8 local LoBs
- [AsiaRe Mapping Rules](/FutuRe/AsiaRe/TransactionMapping/MappingRules) — 8 split rules across 8 local LoBs
